step_connect.heading: Select a Repository
step_connect.description: Choose a repository with an existing Telar site.
step_connect.no_installations: You need to install the Telar Compositor app on your GitHub account before you can connect a repository.
step_connect.install_hint: After installing, come back to this page and refresh to see your repositories.
step_connect.missing_repo_callout_body: The Telar Compositor app only sees repos in accounts and organizations where it's installed. To use a repo from another account or org, install the app there.
step_connect.missing_repo_callout_cta: Install on another account or organization
step_connect.unlink_body: This will remove {{repo}} from the compositor and delete all imported data (objects, stories, glossary, configuration).
step_connect.unlink_warning: Any unpublished edits will be lost. Your GitHub repository will not be affected.
step_connect.private_repo_warning_body: Free GitHub accounts can't publish websites from private repositories. <repoSettings>Set this repository to public</repoSettings> in your GitHub settings, or upgrade to a paid GitHub account — if you're a student, you may qualify for the free <studentPack>GitHub Student Developer Pack</studentPack>. Either way, you'll need to come back here and start the import process again.

step_sync.heading: Importing Content
step_sync.error_not_telar: This doesn't appear to be a Telar site.
step_sync.error_empty_repo: This repository is empty. Select one with an existing Telar site.
step_sync.error_already_connected: This repository is already connected. To re-import it, unlink it first from the repository list.
step_sync.error_sheets_access: Could not access the published Google Sheet. Please provide the correct URL.

step_review.heading: Import Complete
step_review.sheets_warning: Your site uses Google Sheets as its data source. On your first publish, the compositor will switch to managing content directly and disable the Sheets connection in your site configuration.
step_review.config_explanation: Your site's configuration was imported from your repository. You can review and adjust key settings now — such as the site title and description that appear on your landing page, the color theme, the language, and the URL where your site is published. If everything looks right in the summary above, you can skip this step — all settings are available later from the Config tab.

step_done.heading: You're All Set!
step_done.description: Your Telar site has been imported successfully.

site_config.heading: Checking your site configuration
site_config.intro: Let's make sure everything is set up correctly before you start working. Don't worry — the compositor can fix any issues for you.
site_config.sheets_failed: Google Sheets needs to be disabled
site_config.sheets_why: The compositor manages your content directly. Google Sheets must be disabled so the two don't conflict during builds. We'll disable it for you.
site_config.sheets_reversible: You can switch back to Google Sheets at any time by setting enabled: true under google_sheets in your site's _config.yml.
site_config.pages_why: Your site needs GitHub Pages to be published. Without it, your site won't be accessible and IIIF tiles can't be generated. We'll switch it on for you.
site_config.url_failed: Site URL needs to be updated
site_config.url_pending: Site URL can't be verified yet
site_config.url_why: The URL in _config.yml must match your GitHub Pages deployment so IIIF image tiles load from the correct address.
site_config.url_pending_why: We'll configure the correct URL automatically when we enable GitHub Pages. If there is an issue we'll correct it.
site_config.error_pages_permission: The compositor needs permission to enable GitHub Pages on your repository. Accept the updated permissions in your GitHub App settings, then try again.
site_config.error_generic: We couldn't fix the configuration. Please try again, or check your GitHub App permissions.

form.title: Create a new Telar site
form.name_hint: Letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores. Must not start with a dot or hyphen.

errors.repo_name_taken: A repository with this name already exists on your account. Choose a different name.
errors.permission_denied: The Telar Compositor GitHub App needs permission to create repositories. Update the app's permissions in your GitHub settings and try again.
errors.repo_not_ready: Your new repository is still being set up. This usually takes a few seconds — reload the page and try again.
errors.github_error: Something went wrong talking to GitHub. Please try again in a moment.
errors.invalid_name: This name isn't valid. Use letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores. It must not start with a dot or hyphen.
errors.name_exists: A repository with this name already exists on your account.

progress.still_setting_up: Your site is still being set up. Reload the page to continue.
progress.success: Your new Telar site is ready.

installation_scope.title: Grant access to your new site
installation_scope.body: The Telar Compositor GitHub App needs permission to see your new repository before you can start editing. Click the button below to update the app's access on GitHub, then come back to this page.
installation_scope.waiting: Waiting for access to your new repository...

account_modal.title: Choose where to create your site
account_modal.description: Pick the account or organisation where the new repository should live.
